name: Spinach and Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 oz) frozen chopped spinach, drained
1 can (14 oz) Artichoke Hearts, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to broil.
2. Drain the spinach well and combine it with the remaining ingredients in a microwave-safe dish; mix well.
3. Microwave on High until bubbly.
4. Top with provolone cheese.
5. Broil until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
6. Serve with salsa and tortilla chips.
